""")

print(f"зҳҰиҘҝж№–ж°ҙиҙЁз«ҷ(еҢ–еӯҰжі•) - жңҖиҝ‘30еӨ©ж°ҙиҙЁеҲҶжһҗ")
print(f"ж•°жҚ®иҢғеӣҙ: {rows[0]['spt'].date()} ~ {rows[-1]['spt'].date()}")
print(f"ж•°жҚ®жқЎж•°: {len(rows)} жқЎ (жҜҸж—ҘдёҖжқЎ)")
print("=" * 80)

# Collect stats
from statistics import mean, stdev, median

do_values = [float(r['dox']) for r in rows if r['dox']]
codmn_values = [float(r['codmn']) for r in rows if r['codmn']]
nh3n_values = [float(r['nh3n']) for r in rows if r['nh3n']]
tp_values = [float(r['tp']) for r in rows if r['tp']]
ph_values = [float(r['ph']) for r in rows if r['ph']]
wtmp_values = [float(r['wtmp']) for r in rows if r['wtmp']]

def stat_label(name, values):
    if not values:
        return f"  {name}: ж— ж•°жҚ®"
    return f"  {name}: еқҮеҖј={mean(values):.2f}, дёӯдҪҚ={median(values):.2f}, жңҖе°Ҹ={min(values):.2f}, жңҖеӨ§={max(values):.2f}, ж ҮеҮҶе·®={stdev(values):.2f}"

print("\n--- еҗ„жҢҮж Үз»ҹи®Ў ---")
print(stat_label("жә¶и§Јж°§ (DO, mg/L)", do_values))
print(stat_label("й«ҳй”°й…ёзӣҗжҢҮж•° (CODMn, mg/L)", codmn_values))
print(stat_label("ж°Ёж°® (NH3N, mg/L)", nh3n_values))
print(stat_label("жҖ»зЈ· (TP, mg/L)", tp_values))
print(stat_label("pHеҖј", ph_values))
print(stat_label("ж°ҙжё© (Wtmp, в„ғ)", wtmp_values))

# Rate each day
print("\n--- жҜҸж—Ҙж°ҙиҙЁиҜ„зә§ ---")
rating_counts = {}
for r in rows:
    overall = evaluate_overall(
        codmn=float(r['codmn']) if r['codmn'] else None,
        do=float(r['dox']) if r['dox'] else None,
        nh3n=float(r['nh3n']) if r['nh3n'] else None,
        tp=float(r['tp']) if r['tp'] else None
    )
    # Detailed ratings
    codmn_rate = rate_indicator('CODMn', float(r['codmn'])) if r['codmn'] else '-'
    do_rate = rate_indicator('DO', float(r['dox'])) if r['dox'] else '-'
    nh3n_rate = rate_indicator('NH3N', float(r['nh3n'])) if r['nh3n'] else '-'
    tp_rate = rate_indicator('TP', float(r['tp'])) if r['tp'] else '-'
    
    rating_counts[overall] = rating_counts.get(overall, 0) + 1
    print(f"  {r['spt'].date()}: з»јеҗҲ={overall} (CODMn={codmn_rate}, DO={do_rate}, NH3N={nh3n_rate}, TP={tp_rate})")

print("\n--- иҜ„зә§еҲҶеёғ ---")
for level in LEVELS:
    if level in rating_counts:
        pct = rating_counts[level] / len(rows) * 100
        print(f"  {level}зұ»: {rating_counts[level]}еӨ© ({pct:.0f}%)")
"}
